ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size designation across different standards (e.g., EU 0, UK 0, US 0) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* International standard (e.g., EU, UK, US) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region where the size standard is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with these measurements */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "hollow_to_hem_cm" REAL /* Hollow to hem measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust_cm" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" REAL /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "hollow_to_hem_cm" REAL /* Hollow to hem measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam length measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended size */,
  "category" TEXT /* Type of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comfort (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns_data" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., size too small, size too large) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the return data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
